Call ID: EXT-012
Type: external
Date: 2026-02-20
Topic: Renewal Negotiation
Participants: Jonas (account manager); Aisha (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Jonas): Hi Aisha, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Aisha): The renewal quote came in higher than we budgeted for.
AM (Jonas): I'd love to walk through the value you've realized this year.
Customer (Aisha): The team is generally positive, but there are gaps.
AM (Jonas): Let's look at your usage — you've grown into a higher tier organically.
Customer (Aisha): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Jonas): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
